analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of docs.detectify.com covered 116 pages with 100% crawl coverage and 91.5% overall confidence. The site contains 5 confirmed broken internal links requiring immediate remediation. API reference coverage stands at 69.03% across 23 detected API pages, indicating significant documentation gaps. Example reliability is critically low at 0.0%, suggesting no validated code samples exist. All 116 pages include last-updated metadata, demonstrating strong freshness tracking.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage achieved (100%) with all 116 discovered pages examined
High overall audit confidence at 91.5% with strong link verification (95% confidence)
Full last-updated metadata coverage (100%) across all pages enables effective freshness monitoring
Zero repository navigation broken links; all 5 broken links are user-facing documentation issues
No SEO/geo issues detected (0.0% issue rate)
risks: 5 confirmed broken internal documentation links directly impact user navigation and trust
API reference coverage at 69.03% leaves nearly one-third of API surface undocumented
Example reliability at 0.0% indicates no executable or validated code samples exist
23 API pages detected may be insufficient for comprehensive API documentation
Lack of working examples severely impacts developer onboarding and implementation success
API confidence at 85% suggests potential gaps in API page detection accuracy
Missing 30.97% of API documentation creates blind spots for integration teams

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 5 confirmed broken internal documentation links
Implement example validation pipeline to achieve minimum 80% reliability score
Audit API surface and create documentation for missing 30.97% coverage gap
Add executable code examples to all 23 existing API pages
Establish automated link checking in CI/CD to prevent future broken links

limitations: External audit cannot verify technical accuracy of documentation content or correctness of implementation guidance
API coverage detection relies on page structure patterns; actual API completeness requires internal API inventory comparison
Example reliability score reflects static analysis only; runtime validation against live APIs not performed
Freshness metadata presence confirmed but actual content currency requires subject matter expert review
User experience quality, clarity, and comprehensiveness of explanations not assessed by automated tooling
